title: Uruguayan Chicken Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from Uruguay, made with tender chicken and tangy ingredients.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the uruguayan tangy sauce, carrots, and potatoes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 25-30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
